name: ot_appointment_reminder
body_text: Hi {{1}}, this is a reminder of your occupational therapy appointment on {{2}} at {{3}}. Please call to reschedule if needed.

name: exercise_followup
body_text: Hi {{1}}, don't forget to complete your home exercise program for {{2}}. Let me know how it feels during our next session.

name: new_patient_welcome
body_text: Welcome to Pacific Rehabilitation Associates, {{1}}! Your first occupational therapy session is on {{2}}. We look forward to working with you.
